Hi Emmanuele, it's our midpoint review. Looking back at the first half, what are you proud of?
Hi David. Looking back at January, I translated every sentence. Now I present the results in English.
That's great progress. And what are you working on right now?
Right now, I'm working on the Rain Plan and preparing the launch for the second half.
Good. How are this year's numbers, compared to last year?
Our growth is stronger than last year. We are above the benchmark.
Excellent. And what is your biggest challenge for the second half?
My biggest challenge is speed. In August, I'm going to present to the Global team.

Hi Emmanuele, it's David. Just a quick message before our review call. Looking back at the last four months, I want to say thank you. In our first meetings, you translated every sentence in your head. Now you present the Brazil results in English, live. Your growth is very clear to the Global team. This year, Brazil is stronger than last year, and you talk about it with confidence. Our biggest challenge for the second half is the August meeting, so we will focus on that. See you on the call.

Hi Emmanuele, it's Claire from the Global team. A quick recap of your first sixteen classes before your review. First, you learned to introduce yourself and your role. Then you learned the past, the present, and your future plans. Last month you compared Brazil's results against the global benchmark, and you did it very well. Looking back at all of this, you are not the same speaker you were in January. In the second half, we are going to work on speed and on the launch presentation. You are doing great. Talk soon.

Looking back at the first half, I am proud of my progress. In January, I translated every sentence in my head. Now I present the Brazil results in English. Our growth this year is stronger than last year. My biggest challenge is speed, and I am going to work on it.
